name: Remo Golf  Indoor Golf Simulator in Point Venture
address: 422 Venture Blvd S, Point Venture, TX 78645
about: Remo Golf Point Venture offers a premium, private indoor golf simulator experience located on the grounds of Point Venture Golf Club. It features luxury suites designed for comfort and privacy, utilizing TrackMan iO technology trusted by PGA Tour professionals for precise swing and ball tracking. The venue is designed for groups of up to four players and serves golfers, business professionals, and families looking for an exclusive environment to play, practice, or meet. Basic rates are $50 per hour, with booking available through their online platform.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA Tour-level TrackMan iO technology for precise swing analytics
Completely private and distraction-free luxury suite environment
Climate control, adaptive lighting, and personalized music for each session
Access to 250+ premium golf courses through Virtual Golf 3

food_and_drink.notes: No food allowed inside the simulator space to maintain cleanliness and condition.
No beverages allowed inside the simulator space.

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual tracking technology using radar and cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own or contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverages are allowed inside the simulator space to maintain cleanliness and condition of the units.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, as it depends on player pace and virtual course selection.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Users must be at least 18 years old to use the simulator without adult supervision. Those under 18 must be accompanied by a responsible adult.
